title: Toulou Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Toulou, with a Z-Score of +6.06. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level.
body:
The current heat wave in Toulou has resulted in a significant increase in temperature, with a CDD of 20.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 24%, while the wind speed is moderate at 10.7 km/h. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, which is typical for a heat wave.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
